user.title: Connect to MiGo
user.description: Enter the same credentials you use in the Saunier Duval MiGo app.

pick_home.title: Select home
pick_home.description: Multiple homes found on your account. Select the one you want to integrate.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate MiGo
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

error.no_homes_found: No homes found on this account.
